bench_press.name: Bench Press
bench_press.description: Basic exercise for developing the chest muscles.

pull_up.name: Pull-up
pull_up.description: Exercise to work the back and biceps.

barbell_curl.name: Barbell Curl
barbell_curl.description: Exercise to strengthen the biceps with a barbell.

preacher_curl.name: Preacher Curl
preacher_curl.description: Isolate the biceps using an inclined bench.

cable_biceps_hammer.name: Cable Hammer Curl
cable_biceps_hammer.description: Works the biceps and forearms with a neutral grip.

cable_biceps_neutral.name: Cable Biceps Curl Neutral Grip
cable_biceps_neutral.description: Exercise for the biceps using a cable machine and neutral grip.

concentration_curl_hammer.name: Concentration Hammer Curl
concentration_curl_hammer.description: Isolate the biceps with a concentration movement and hammer grip.

concentration_curl_neutral.name: Concentration Curl Neutral Grip
concentration_curl_neutral.description: Isolate the biceps with a concentration movement using a neutral grip.

hammer_curl.name: Hammer Curl
hammer_curl.description: Curl with hammer grip to work the biceps and forearms.

incline_dumbbell_curl.name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
incline_dumbbell_curl.description: Curl on an incline bench to target the biceps.

incline_hammer_curl.name: Incline Hammer Curl
incline_hammer_curl.description: Hammer curl on an incline bench for biceps and forearms.

incline_bench_press.name: Incline Bench Press
incline_bench_press.description: Targets the upper chest on an incline bench.

dumbbell_bench_press.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
dumbbell_bench_press.description: Exercise for the chest using dumbbells.

incline_dumbbell_press.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
incline_dumbbell_press.description: Targets the upper chest with dumbbells.

pec_fly.name: Chest Fly
pec_fly.description: Isolation exercise for the chest muscles.

cable_crossover.name: Cable Crossover
cable_crossover.description: Works the chest using cables for a full range of motion.

push_up.name: Push-up
push_up.description: Classic exercise for chest and triceps.

machine_chest_press.name: Chest Press Machine
machine_chest_press.description: Works the chest using a guided machine.

skull_crusher.name: Skull Crusher
skull_crusher.description: Lying on a bench, lower the bar or dumbbells toward your forehead and extend back up to work the triceps.

skull_crusher_behind_head.name: Skull Crusher Behind Head
skull_crusher_behind_head.description: Lying on a bench, lower the dumbbell or bar behind your head and extend to target the triceps.

dips_triceps.name: Triceps Dips
dips_triceps.description: Support your body on parallel bars and bend your elbows to work the triceps.

machine_dips.name: Machine Triceps Dips
machine_dips.description: Using the dip machine, push down to engage the triceps.

dumbbell_triceps_extension.name: Dumbbell Triceps Extension
dumbbell_triceps_extension.description: Hold a dumbbell overhead and lower it behind your head, then extend your arms.

cable_triceps_extension.name: Cable Triceps Extension
cable_triceps_extension.description: Using a cable machine, push the handle downward to extend the arms and work the triceps.

triceps_kickback.name: Triceps Kickback
triceps_kickback.description: Bend forward with dumbbells and extend your arms backward to target the triceps.

arnold_press.name: Arnold Press
arnold_press.description: Hold dumbbells in front of your shoulders and rotate outward while pressing overhead.

military_press.name: Military Press
military_press.description: Press a barbell overhead from shoulder height while standing or seated.

barbell_shoulder_press.name: Barbell Shoulder Press
barbell_shoulder_press.description: Lift a barbell from shoulder level overhead to target the deltoids.

machine_shoulder_press.name: Machine Shoulder Press
machine_shoulder_press.description: Sit on the shoulder press machine and push the handles upward.

rear_delt_fly.name: Rear Delt Fly
rear_delt_fly.description: Bend forward and open your arms to the sides with dumbbells to work rear delts.

rear_delt_raise.name: Rear Delt Raise
rear_delt_raise.description: Work the rear delts with dumbbells.

dumbbell_front_raise.name: Dumbbell Front Raise
dumbbell_front_raise.description: Lift dumbbells in front of you to shoulder height.

cable_front_raise.name: Cable Front Raise
cable_front_raise.description: Using a cable, lift your arm forward to shoulder height.

dumbbell_lateral_raise.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
dumbbell_lateral_raise.description: Lift dumbbells to the sides until shoulder height.

cable_lateral_raise.name: Cable Lateral Raise
cable_lateral_raise.description: Use a cable machine to lift the arm laterally to shoulder height.

wide_grip_pull_up.name: Wide Grip Pull-up
wide_grip_pull_up.description: Hang from a bar with a wide grip and pull your chest toward it.

close_grip_pull_up.name: Close Grip Pull-up
close_grip_pull_up.description: Hang from a bar with a narrow grip and pull your chest toward it.

wide_grip_seated_row.name: Seated Row Wide Grip
wide_grip_seated_row.description: Pull the handle toward your torso while keeping a wide grip.

close_grip_seated_row.name: Seated Row Close Grip
close_grip_seated_row.description: Pull the handle toward your torso using a narrow grip.

wide_grip_lat_pulldown.name: Wide Grip Lat Pulldown
wide_grip_lat_pulldown.description: Pull the bar down in front of your chest with a wide grip.

close_grip_lat_pulldown.name: Close Grip Lat Pulldown
close_grip_lat_pulldown.description: Pull the bar down in front of your chest with a close grip.

barbell_row.name: Barbell Row
barbell_row.description: Bend over and pull the barbell toward your torso to work the back.

dumbbell_shrug.name: Dumbbell Shrug
dumbbell_shrug.description: Hold dumbbells and shrug your shoulders upward to target traps.

deadlift.name: Deadlift
deadlift.description: Lift a barbell from the ground to hip height, keeping a straight back.

dumbbell_calf_raise.name: Dumbbell Calf Raise
dumbbell_calf_raise.description: Hold dumbbells and raise your heels to work the calves.

dumbbell_lunge.name: Dumbbell Lunge
dumbbell_lunge.description: Step forward with dumbbells and lower your knee to work legs and glutes.

hack_squat.name: Hack Squat
hack_squat.description: Push the platform of the hack squat machine with your legs.

seated_leg_curl.name: Seated Leg Curl
seated_leg_curl.description: Curl the legs backward on a seated leg curl machine.

lying_leg_curl.name: Lying Leg Curl
lying_leg_curl.description: Lie face down and curl the legs up on the machine.

leg_extension.name: Leg Extension
leg_extension.description: Extend the legs forward on the leg extension machine.

leg_press.name: Leg Press
leg_press.description: Push the platform with your legs on a leg press machine.

barbell_squat.name: Barbell Squat
barbell_squat.description: Perform a squat holding a barbell on your shoulders.

dumbbell_squat.name: Dumbbell Squat
dumbbell_squat.description: Perform a squat holding dumbbells by your sides.

floor_crunch.name: Floor Crunch
floor_crunch.description: Lie on the floor and crunch upward to engage abs.

incline_bench_crunch.name: Incline Bench Crunch
incline_bench_crunch.description: Lie on an incline bench and crunch upward.

cable_crunch.name: Cable Crunch
cable_crunch.description: Using a cable, crunch downward to engage the abs.

oblique_crunch.name: Oblique Crunch
oblique_crunch.description: Crunch sideways to target the oblique muscles.
